texts.full_text: ment business in Sanford, works with 3-year-old Zachary Wilson in her offices downtown. SANFORD — Small businesses haven't recovered from the recession nearly as well as larger businesses have, according to the National Federation of Independent Businesses. The group also found that small business owners consider government regulation — not falling consumer demand — their biggest obstacle to success. The NFIB also found that small businesses

texts.full_text: dd keypress event to itTo add a keypress event to a dynamically created input field in jQuery, you need to use event delegation. This is because dynamically created elements do not exist in the DOM at the time the event is being bound.
